reviews.review_description: I am unable to use is for streaming. I can login but once I start the movies, they just won't play through this app.

BEWARE. 0.4.1 Update states, "We've added support for MVC 3D decoding and playback in our VR application. This means you can now enjoy MVC 3D content from file formats like Blu-ray 3D ISO, mkv, m2ts, ts, mts, and more." This functionality is why I bought the app, but I've never been able to use this functionality because it appears to be removed as of 0.4.4. If it is not added back in ASAP I will be getting a refund. I will update my review if the developer adds this functionality back in.

developer_response.body: Sorry, this is my problem. There is a problem with the expression in 0.4.1. We found that there is a bug in the decoding of mvc-3D. The repair may take a long time. If you really need this feature, you can get a refund first. 4XVR player currently has the best support for mvc-3D, you can use it

reviews.review_description: I use it to watch videos of Netflix and Apple tv, which are generally smooth and clear through computer streaming. Of course, it would be better if it can be built into the application to watch directly.

The ease with which Super Screen allows users to share media files from their computers to VR devices is nothing short of revolutionary. The application's support for multiple platforms, including Windows and Mac, and its compatibility with various video formats, make it a standout in the realm of VR applications. This level of convenience and flexibility has greatly enhanced my media consumption, allowing me to enjoy a wide range of content effortlessly.

It’s rapidly beeing updated by the developers and after giving feedback they do a great work!
Video quality for playback is nice Sharp and crisp! Plays everything I did throw at it.

Some minor stuff to add to the wish list:

Passthru mode MR, is currently ok but is always in the same distance if you try to move close to the image in reality!
It should be added to support like a 2D app mode, to be able to pin the screen to a specific position in your room/environment like the Youtube or Meta TV app and other 2D apps. (That are Staying in the same position so you can walk closer to them or even walk behind them in the room, no borders or play area needed) And also to be able to use the app in parallell with other 2D Apps / Navigation windows! (Question is if 3D playback would work in such 2D mode/window)

Missing an option to turn on, ”always start from beginning of each video” when playing back all files in a folder!
As it remembers each files latest playback position it’s not optimal for playing back for example music videos.

If you skip to the next video during playback in the middle of a video, it will start from that position the next time you want to play it back or when it’s started as of now. So maybe a button to enable or disable it would be great as loop playback for single file or folder / playlist creation.

Anyway,
Great App, with new possibilities!
Super clean picture and sound. I was wondering how long can we expect the ability to change seats in theater mode happen?

Having some issues since purchase. Disney plus app won’t play videos keeps coming up error code 83. Seems Disney don’t support it or something. 
Same issue with prime video. 

No solution yet unsure why it’s like this
It’s easy to use interface and app support make it one of the best media players in the market

developer_response.body: Thank you for your support and look forward to more feedback from you, either on facebook or github

reviews.review_description: I bought this and tried to play a 3d-sbs video but it didn’t display it correctly.

developer_response.body:
We are very sorry to bring you a bad experience. This was an oversight on my part, as I've been posting a version every Friday lately. There are many tasks this week, and the testing work is not sufficient. A bug was introduced in the latest version 0.4.6 as dimensions are no longer updated promptly after switching to 3D mode. I just urgently released 0.4.7 today to fix it. Anyway, thanks for your feedback
https://github.com/liuw086/SuperScreen/issues/40

reviews.review_description:
i only rated 3 stars as it has a lot of catching up to do to keep up with some other video players out there that has youtube and usb to watch movies from the pc connection is very laggy even when i close the app my  pointer is still moving when i have taken off my headset and my mouse cannot overide it so have to wait till it has finished moving like it is possessed..
looking forward to see where this is going to go in the way of features to compete with other players on the market and the remote desktop connection vs virtual desktop
very happy with the movies i have watched quality is clear and crispy had no issues

developer_response.body:
Thank you for your support and feedback. As you said, one of our recent priorities is to improve some basic functions of the player as soon as possible. The issue with remote desktop pointer movement is a bug and has fixed in the version 0.4.3.
Looking forward to your feedback after use！

reviews.review_description: Says unsupported browser any way around that? And why doesn't plex ask for a link to connect like everywhere else?

developer_response.body: Sorry for the trouble this has caused you. Could you please provide a screenshot of your problem here? https://github.com/liuw086/SuperScreen/issues/60

reviews.review_description: hope it can support the adjustment of the angle, so that I can watch movies in bed conveniently.

developer_response.body: Thank you for your feedback. Freely adjust the screen angle to facilitate lying down and watching movies. The mode is already under development, so stay tuned.

reviews.review_description: This app works great,especially its ability to connect to my computeto play videos and play computer games. Definitely a good option fowatching 3D movies with the Quest3 and using the app to watchmovies in your living room while still being able to see the rest of theroom through the mode. I highly recommend you give it a try. Butlhope the USB disk will be available as soon as possible

developer_response.body: Thank you for your likes. USB support is under development and will be supported in future versions.

reviews.review_title: The overall experience is not bad.
reviews.review_description: There are photos in my hard disk besides 180 videos, but I can't recognize photos now. I hope to support them as soon as possible, and I will use them as the preferred player.

developer_response.body: Thanks for your feedback, 3D image file viewing is also on the TODO list.

reviews.review_description: I hope to support watching movies with my friends.Just like big screen.Use higher definition
I have a large collection of high-definition videos in nas system. At present, it's ok to share them with smb, but sometimes there is a jam, so I still like to use webdav

developer_response.body: Thank you for your support, webdav support is on the way

reviews.review_description: After clicking in and showing the unity icon, the app is frozen and cannot be controlled.

developer_response.body:
I'm very sorry to bring you a bad experience, and thank you for your support and feedback. I have recorded the problems you encountered here, https://github.com/liuw086/SuperScreen/issues/24 
0.4.4 has been released. Please upgrade and check again to see if this problem still exists. We look forward to your reply. Thanks again for the clues

reviews.review_description: You're a fraud. It doesn't support MVC 3D at all. I'm going to complain to Meta about this scam. Other features are garbage too, can't compare to Skybox.

developer_response.body: Sorry that there was a version of the description that caused trouble to you. The relevant introduction has been deleted because of bugs. Skybox is of course a great application. If SuperScreen is of no use to you, you can refund it as soon as possible to avoid losses.
